title: Landmark Books is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Landmark Books is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Landmark Books is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Tiruchirappalli. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Landmark Books:
Landmark Books is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Books!
